Buggerhead.Name: Buggerhead
Buggerhead.Keywords: Garou - Bone Gnawer - Ragabash - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Buggerhead.Text: While in play, Buggerhead allows you to discard and redraw any 1 sept card at the end of your normal Redraw Phase.

Caias Katyrev.Name: Caias Katyrev
Caias Katyrev.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Male
Caias Katyrev.Text: Caias is young and impetuous, wanting to earn a place for himself in the Silver Record.

Carla Grimsson.Name: Carla Grimsson
Carla Grimsson.Keywords: Garou - Get of Fenris - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Female
Carla Grimsson.Text: If a moot called by Carla's pack does not pass, she shifts to Crinos and must be alpha for that turn's Combat Phase.
Carla Grimsson.Errata: Clarification: Carla's ability triggers only if the moot FAILS, not if it is delayed or cancelled. (2014)"

Carleson Ruah.Name: Carleson Ruah
Carleson Ruah.Keywords: Garou - Shadow Lords - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Male
Carleson Ruah.Text: Carleson can interrupt another alpha's action to allows his pack's alpha to act first, as long as Carleson's alpha attacks a Wyrm creature.
Carleson Ruah.Errata: Errata: Interruption is an offensive action that happens before the declaration step of the alpha action being interrupted 6/27/2015

Carlos Navarro.Name: Carlos Navarro
Carlos Navarro.Keywords: Garou - Shadow Lords - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
Carlos Navarro.Text: When Carlos uses a Firearm, his combat actions cannot be dodged.

Cassandra Shadow-watcher.Name: Cassandra Shadow-watcher
Cassandra Shadow-watcher.Keywords: Garou - Black Fury - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Female
Cassandra Shadow-watcher.Text: Cassandra plays combat actions at +2 Rage when fighting Get of Fenris.

Cernonous.Name: Cernonous
Cernonous.Keywords: Garou - Children of Gaia - Theurge - Metis - Gaia - Male
Cernonous.Text: Cernonous is considered -1 Renown for moot voting due to his Metis disfigurement.

Cesare Sodalis.Name: Cesare Sodalis
Cesare Sodalis.Keywords: Garou - Silent Striders - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Male
Cesare Sodalis.Text: Cesare has been a friend to many mages during the course of his travels. He is not affected by any Gifts used by mages.
Cesare Sodalis.Errata: Cesare's Gifts may be cancelled by Mages as the mage is targetting the Gift, not Cesare. His Equipment can be targetted by Mages, as they are targetting the equipment, not Cesare."

Charging Bull.Name: Charging Bull
Charging Bull.Keywords: Garou - Wendigo - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Male
Charging Bull.Text: No character of higher Renown than Charging Bull can refuse his challenges.

Chaser-After.Name: Chaser-After
Chaser-After.Keywords: Garou - Fianna - Philodox - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Chaser-After.Text: Chaser-After is well-respected by other Garou in his role of judge. He is considered +1 Renown for Moot voting.

Cheesy Puffs.Name: Cheesy Puffs
Cheesy Puffs.Keywords: Garou - Bone Gnawer - Philodox - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Cheesy Puffs.Text: Cheesy Puffs is impatient about defeating the Wyrm. He may never voluntarily pass as his Alpha action if an Enemy or Wyrm Alpha is in play.

Chirox the Unfeeling.Name: Chirox the Unfeeling
Chirox the Unfeeling.Text: Immediately following the Regeneration Phase any 1 pack mate can transfer her lowest damage card to Chirox.
Chirox the Unfeeling.Errata: Errata: Chirox's ability is used in Regeneration Closed, after your pack has regenerated."

Ciran Far-Traveler.Name: Ciran Far-Traveler
Ciran Far-Traveler.Keywords: Garou - Stargazers - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Kailindo - Male
Ciran Far-Traveler.Text: Kailindo. Ciran is a member of the Zephyr camp of the Stargazers and has mastered Kailindo. He will never use a Kailindo Combat Action during a frenzy.

Clubfoot Razorneck.Name: Clubfoot Razorneck
Clubfoot Razorneck.Keywords: Garou - Uktena - Ahroun - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Clubfoot Razorneck.Text: Clubfoot cannot dodge, but her attacks may not be blocked by opponents. She can only be in a pack with Uktena, Wendigo, Silent Striders, Stargazers, or non-Garou.

Conrad Walks-the-Line.Name: Conrad Walks-the-Line
Conrad Walks-the-Line.Keywords: Garou - Shadow Lords - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Wyrm - Male
Conrad Walks-the-Line.Text: Conrad may be in either Gaia or Wyrm packs. If he is in a Wyrm pack, he may only use Shadow Lords and Beast-of-War Gifts.

Corcoran Mac Andrews.Name: Corcoran Mac Andrews
Corcoran Mac Andrews.Keywords: Garou - Fianna - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Male
Corcoran Mac Andrews.Text: Corcoran's Gnosis is considered 5 for the purpose of using Gifts.
Corcoran Mac Andrews.Errata: Corcoran should read 'Corcoran's Gnosis is considered +2 for the purpose of using Gifts.'

Corinna.Name: Corinna
Corinna.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Galliard - Pentex - Homid - Beast-of-War - Wyrm - Team #21 - Female
Corinna.Text: A member of Pentex First Team #21, Corinna can pack attack or defend with any other members of this team in her pack.

Count Vladimir Rustovitch.Name: Count Vladimir Rustovitch
Count Vladimir Rustovitch.Text: Vladimir can automatically regenerate the lowest damage card at the end of any combat in which he killed at least 1 opponent. Vladimir can use Black Spiral Dancer, 7th Generation, Homid and Shadow Lords Gifts.

Crick Rumwrangler.Name: Crick Rumwrangler
Crick Rumwrangler.Keywords: Garou - Bone Gnawer - Philodox - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Crick Rumwrangler.Text: Crick has gained notoriety for battling the Wyrm in the Amazon jungle.

Crookpaw.Name: Crookpaw
Crookpaw.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Ragabash - Metis - Gaia - Male
Crookpaw.Text: Crookpaw is often called 'more lupus than lupus.' He may not be alpha if there are no other Red Talons in his pack unless he is the only character left.
Crookpaw.Errata: See Faq entry on can't versus must effects.

Danica Rimbaud.Name: Danica Rimbaud
Danica Rimbaud.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Female
Danica Rimbaud.Text: Danica is the Steward of her protectorate's Lodge of the Sun. She may call any Moot votes; even those that have requirements she does not possess.

Daniela Black.Name: Daniela Black
Daniela Black.Keywords: Garou - Black Fury - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Female
Daniela Black.Text: Devoted to recovering Fetishes for her tribe, Daniela may discard one fetish she controls at the start of the Regeneration Phase and place it in her Victory Pile, where it is worth 2VP.

David MacKenzie.Name: David MacKenzie
David MacKenzie.Keywords: Garou - Children of Gaia - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
David MacKenzie.Text: David may use Eater-of-Souls Gifts. David may not be Alpha if there are any Black Spiral Dancers in play unless he is your only character.

Dharma Bum.Name: Dharma Bum
Dharma Bum.Keywords: Garou - Bone Gnawer - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Male
Dharma Bum.Text: Dharma's rapping and howling cause all opponent's to suffer -2 Gnosis while in combat with him.
Dharma Bum.Errata: Errata: Dharma should read 'Dharma's rapping and howling cause all opponents fighting him in combat to lose 2 Gnosis while in combat with him'.

Diem.Name: Diem
Diem.Keywords: Garou - Children of Gaia - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Male
Diem.Text: Once per game, Diem can interrupt the vote on one moot and delay it until next turn.  Voting begins next Moot Phase.

Alestro.Name: Alestro
Alestro.Keywords: Garou - Black Fury - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Female
Alestro.Text: One of the few remaining native Black Fury Amazons, Alestro will not join a pack unless a Black Fury, Uktena, Mokole or Bastet is also present.
Alestro.Errata: If an effect forces Alestro into a pack that does NOT contain at least one Black, Fury, Uktena, Mokole, or Bastet (example: Eye of the Cobra), discard Alestro. 11/30/15"

Allamande.Name: Allamande
Allamande.Text: Allamande is a Knife Skulker of the Ratkin (wererats) and is a master of stealth.  When Allamande is alpha, his challenges cannot be refused.

Allison Kachina.Name: Allison Kachina
Allison Kachina.Keywords: Garou - Wendigo - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Female
Allison Kachina.Text: Allison can automatically pack attack or defend with her twin brother Thomas.  If Thomas is in another player's pack, Thomas joins at that player's option.

Allonzo Montoya.Name: Allonzo Montoya
Allonzo Montoya.Keywords: Abomination - Garou - Vampire - Homid - Beast-of-War - Wyrm - Male
Allonzo Montoya.Text: Allonzo is a werewolf who has been turned into a vampire. Thoroughly insane, he now serves the Wyrm. Allonzo can use Shadow Lords, Metis and Black Spiral Dancer Gifts. He cannot be alpha 2 turns in a row.
Allonzo Montoya.Errata: See Faq entry on can't versus must effects.

Allya Sun-Follower.Name: Allya Sun-Follower
Allya Sun-Follower.Keywords: Garou - Silent Striders - Ahroun - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Allya Sun-Follower.Text: Allya's calling takes many forms. She must attempt to undergo any Quests that are drawn into her pack's sept hand if she can fulfill the requirements.

Amanda Withers-in-Sun.Name: Amanda Withers-in-Sun
Amanda Withers-in-Sun.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Theurge - Metis - Gaia - Female
Amanda Withers-in-Sun.Text: Amanda can only regenerate when she is in the Umbra.

Amari Howls-from-soul.Name: Amari Howls-from-soul
Amari Howls-from-soul.Keywords: Garou - Black Fury - Galliard - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Amari Howls-from-soul.Text: Amari's packmates gain +1 Rage during pack attacks.

Amelia.Name: Amelia
Amelia.Text: Amelia is a Hatar, a Goblin Spider. Hatars are Wyrm-ridden offshoots of the Ananasi, werespiders. Amelia can use Ragabash, Shadow Lords, and Black Spiral Gifts.

Anna Kliminski.Name: Anna Kliminski
Anna Kliminski.Keywords: Garou - Shadow Lords - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Female
Anna Kliminski.Text: Anna may begin the game armed with a Klaive Equipment card.

Anna-Eyes of the Sun-Pelfrey.Name: Anna-Eyes of the Sun-Pelfrey
Anna-Eyes of the Sun-Pelfrey.Keywords: Garou - Uktena - Galliard - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Anna-Eyes of the Sun-Pelfrey.Text: Anna has +1 Renown for moot votes.

Antonine Teardrop.Name: Antonine Teardrop
Antonine Teardrop.Keywords: Garou - Stargazers - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
Antonine Teardrop.Text: If Antonine equips with a Klaive, it can never be stolen or discarded - as long as he lives.

Atahualpa, Blood of the Incas\tTheWarOfT.Name:

She can still use Bastet Gifts.	Effect that would FORCE Atahualpa to withdraw or escape (example: Anatomy Lesson or Bum Rush) won't make her withdraw or escape unless they are used after the 4th round of combat. 11/30/15

If an opponent can play more than one combat card, Banana Split can only cancel one of the cards. Banana Split

Barnaby Shadrack.Name: Barnaby Shadrack
Barnaby Shadrack.Keywords: Human - Pentex - Executive - Mage - Homid - Defiler - Wyrm - Male
Barnaby Shadrack.Text: Barnaby can begin the game equipped with a Submachine Gun. A Submachine Gun will always do aggravated damage in Barnaby's hands. He can choose to ignore the effects of any Gifts used upon him and adds 2 cards to your sept hand.
Barnaby Shadrack.Errata: Barnaby increases your sept hand the whole game, not just when he chooses to ignore Gifts. Barnaby cannot be the target of any Gifts unless he allows it. For Gifts that target or affect multiple creatures at the same time, all other targets are still affe"

Bjorn-Blood from Stone.Name: Bjorn-Blood from Stone
Bjorn-Blood from Stone.Keywords: Garou - Get of Fenris - Ahroun - Metis - Gaia - Male
Bjorn-Blood from Stone.Text: When Bjorn is alpha, spirits bound to other packs cannot refuse his challenges. Bjorn cannot bind a spirit.

Black Claw.Name: Black Claw
Black Claw.Text: Black Claw is practised in many mystical Rites. As his alpha action he may double his Gnosis for the purposes of using Gifts or Equipment. This doubling lasts until the beginning of the next Combat Phase.

Bladetooth.Name: Bladetooth
Bladetooth.Keywords: Garou - Get of Fenris - Theurge - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Bladetooth.Text: Bladetooth is an outcast from the Get.  Bladetooth cannot participate in any pack action with the Get.

Blood-on-the-Wind.Name: Blood-on-the-Wind
Blood-on-the-Wind.Keywords: Garou - Wendigo - Galliard - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Blood-on-the-Wind.Text: All Wendigo in the same pack as Blood-on-the-Wind gain +1 Rage.
Blood-on-the-Wind.Errata: Clarification: Blood on the Winds gives himself +1 Rage (2014)

Blossom.Name: Blossom
Blossom.Keywords: Odyssey - Fomori - Pentex - Homid - Defiler - Wyrm - Female
Blossom.Text: Before Alphas are chosen, Blossom can remove herself and 1 character from play until the end of turn. Neither can take actions other than regenerate during this time. Blossom cannot affect the same target more than twice.
Blossom.Errata: If Blossom was your last Character and she removes herself from play, you are still in the game. She's just temporarily out of play. original: Blossom can remove any 1 character from play for 1 full turn. Blossom is also removed from play and neither can"

Breath of Fire.Name: Breath of Fire
Breath of Fire.Text: At the beginning of each combat, Breath of Fire has the option of doing aggravated damage. If he chooses to do so, he must randomly discard 2 Combat cards.

Bron Mac Fionn.Name: Bron Mac Fionn
Bron Mac Fionn.Keywords: Garou - Fianna - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Male
Bron Mac Fionn.Text: Once per game, Bron can stop any moot in progress.  The moot card is immediately discarded.

Dirty Hans.Name: Dirty Hans
Dirty Hans.Keywords: Iliad - Fomori - Pentex - Homid - Defiler - Wyrm - Male
Dirty Hans.Text: Defiler. During the Moot Phase, Hans may remove one creature with the Police keyword from the Hunting Grounds and make it an Ally of his pack. He cannot use this ability two turns in a row.

Dr. Pearvos Smythe, The Hunter\tTheWarOf.Name:
Dr. Pearvos Smythe, The Hunter	TheWarOfTheAmazon	rage.image.garou.dr.pearvos.smythe.the.hunter,rage.image.crinos.dr.pearvos.smythe.the.hunter	[WC-Ch]	Character - Wyrm			Bane - Homid - Defiler - Wyrm - Male	5	2	2	3	5	5	5		Dr. Smythe may begin the game armed with a Shotgun and a Flak Jacket.	
Dr. Spencer	TheWyrm	rage.image.garou.dr.spencer	[WC-Ch]	Character - Wyrm			Odyssey - Fomori - Pentex - Homid - Eater-of-Souls - Wyrm - Male	2	1	3	2	1	3	2		When directly involved in conflict, Dr. Spencer allows you to see your opponent's card selection before choosing your Combat Action.	See rules on Feinting. Spencer may Feint each round
Dr. Stephen 'Mindbender' Garrison	TheUmbra	rage.image.garou.dr.stephen.mindbender.garrison,rage.image.crinos.dr.stephen.mindbender.garrison	[GU-Ch][GJ-Ch]	Character - Gaia			Garou - Glass Walkers - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Male	6	3	7	3	5	7	6		Stephen is not affected by Gauntlet Fluxes.	
Dreams-of-Wonder	LegacyOfTheTribes	rage.image.garou.dreams.of.wonder,rage.image.crinos.dreams.of.wonder	[GM-Ch][GW-Ch][GU-Ch]	Character - Gaia			Garou - Wendigo - Theurge - Lupus - Gaia - Female	3	1	4	2	2	4	3		Dreams-of-Wonder follows the destiny that the spirits reveal to her. She may pack attack or defend with any spirit Allies in her pack, but draws no extra combat cards when doing so.	If Dreams-of-Wonder is involved in a pack action, she may draw all her spirit allies in.

Duncan MacIvor.Name: Duncan MacIvor
Duncan MacIvor.Keywords: Garou - Fianna - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Male
Duncan MacIvor.Text: Duncan is haunted by memories of Fomori from his Past Lives. Duncan gain +2 Rage while in combat against Fomori. Rivalry: Fomori

Eater-of-Bears.Name: Eater-of-Bears
Eater-of-Bears.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Ragabash - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Eater-of-Bears.Text: Eater-of-Bears has +2 Rage whenever she fights a character in Homid form or a human ally.

Edgewalker.Name: Edgewalker
Edgewalker.Keywords: Garou - Shadow Lords - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Male
Edgewalker.Text: Edgewalker is ever wary of Grandfather Thunder's dark omens.

Evan Heals-the-Past.Name: Evan Heals-the-Past
Evan Heals-the-Past.Keywords: Garou - Wendigo - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
Evan Heals-the-Past.Text: Evan has only recently joined the Garou, but has quickly distinguished himself as an arbitrator and peacemaker.

Evan Heals-the-Past 2.Name: Evan Heals-the-Past 2
Evan Heals-the-Past 2.Keywords: Garou - Wendigo - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
Evan Heals-the-Past 2.Text: Evan has learned much during his travails with his pack. He may recruit Allies with Theurge prerequisites.

Eyes-of-Frost.Name: Eyes-of-Frost
Eyes-of-Frost.Keywords: Garou - Wendigo - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Male
Eyes-of-Frost.Text: Eyes-of-Frost can banish a Pack Totem card, but then cannot use Gifts for the rest of the game.
Eyes-of-Frost.Errata: Clarification: Can only use his ability once per game.

F'foeg S'Sap.Name: F'foeg S'Sap
F'foeg S'Sap.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Philodox - Metis - Beast-of-War - Wyrm - Male
F'foeg S'Sap.Text: F'Foeg must join all pack actions he is eligible to participate in. Loyalty: Black Spiral Dancers.

Fade-To-Black.Name: Fade-To-Black
Fade-To-Black.Keywords: Garou - Glass Walkers - Ragabash - Metis - Gaia - Female
Fade-To-Black.Text: Fade-to-Black is a prodigy with all things Umbral. She is considered +2 Gnosis for the purpose of stepping sideways or using combat cards with a Gnosis requirement. Rivalry: Red Talons.

Fang Jumper.Name: Fang Jumper
Fang Jumper.Keywords: Garou - Get of Fenris - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Male
Fang Jumper.Text: If Fang Jumper's pack alpha is Get of Fenris, Fang Jumper may join the alpha in pack defense at any time.

Fangs-Through-Eye.Name: Fangs-Through-Eye
Fangs-Through-Eye.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Ahroun - Metis - Beast-of-War - Wyrm - Male
Fangs-Through-Eye.Text: Whacked-out and prejudiced, Fangs-Through-Eye will never act to defend a Fomori in the Hunting Grounds.
Fangs-Through-Eye.Errata: CLARIFICATION- Fangs-Through-Eye won't step in for a fomori in the Hunting Grounds. 11/30/15

Fangthane Bloodjaw.Name: Fangthane Bloodjaw
Fangthane Bloodjaw.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Ahroun - Homid - Beast-of-War - Wyrm - Male
Fangthane Bloodjaw.Text: When Fangthane is the attacker, decide randomly whether or not he withdraws at the end of each round.

Fara'un Shark.Name: Fara'un Shark
Fara'un Shark.Text: Eater-of-Souls. When she names targets in combat, Fara'un can make her combat card a Rage 1, Damage 2 Combat Action that is Aggravated. The card remains face down to mark the damage. Fara'un may use Iliad Fomori & Unbound Gifts.

Fek.Name: Fek
Fek.Keywords: Bane - Battle - Defiler - Wyrm - Dark Trinity - Male
Fek.Text: Dark Trinity. Once per game Fek may redirect a fatal blow (or blows) from himself to target Victim. He may automatically join pack defenses with other members of the Dark Trinity. Draw a combat card when this occurs. He will not join pack attacks.

Fine Whine.Name: Fine Whine
Fine Whine.Keywords: Garou - Bone Gnawer - Galliard - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Fine Whine.Text: Fine Whine is prone to flying into fits of drunken rage. When she bluffs a card of Rage 7 or below, decide randomly whether her card stays a bluff or becomes a legal card.

Fireclaw.Name: Fireclaw
Fireclaw.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Theurge - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Fireclaw.Text: Any Rage 1 & 2 combat actions played by Fireclaw do aggravated damage.

Freide Counts-the-Scalps.Name: Freide Counts-the-Scalps
Freide Counts-the-Scalps.Keywords: Garou - Get of Fenris - Galliard - Metis - Gaia - Female
Freide Counts-the-Scalps.Text: Freide has inherited the madness of Gaia's sister Luna. Once per game, she may double any 1 of her statistics (Rage, Gnosis, or Health) for 1 full turn as she looks to the moon for insight.

Frenar.Name: Frenar
Frenar.Text: Eager to prove himself, Frenar can switch places with his pack alpha if that alpha is attacked.
Frenar.Errata: Clarification: this counts as redirecting an attack. See full rules. 11/30/15

George Birch.Name: George Birch
George Birch.Keywords: Human - Pentex - Executive - Homid - Eater-of-Souls - Wyrm - Male
George Birch.Text: An Endron Exec, George earns 2VP for every Gaia Territory or Caern his pack destroys. His pack may attack Gaia Caerns as if they were Territories. If George is attacked, he can have any of your Pentex allies fight in his place.
George Birch.Errata: 'Pentex Allies' are allies which have the Pentex Keyword OR require Pentex or pentex Exec to recruit.

Roar of Storms.Name: Roar of Storms
Roar of Storms.Keywords: Garou - Shadow Lords - Galliard - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Roar of Storms.Text: Roar of Storms can vote as any auspice for moots.

Roars Like Thunder.Name: Roars Like Thunder
Roars Like Thunder.Text: When in Archid form, Roars Like Thunder's challenges cannot be refused. She may escape any combat after the 4th round.

Roger Daly.Name: Roger Daly
Roger Daly.Keywords: Garou - Glass Walkers - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Male
Roger Daly.Text: Roger can destroy the guns and techno-Equipment of any opponent facing him.  Opponents must discard such Equipment cards before combat begins.
Roger Daly.Errata: Clarification: When Roger joins combat, he may destroy all opponents non-fetish equipment at the start of the combat round he joined. Techno-equipment means non-fetish Equipment. (2014)"

Roofwalker.Name: Roofwalker
Roofwalker.Keywords: Garou - Glass Walkers - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
Roofwalker.Text: Roofwalker is constantly struggling with vampires for control of his city. All vampire attacks against Roofwalker are considered challenges, and may thus be declined.

Root Beer Charlie.Name: Root Beer Charlie
Root Beer Charlie.Keywords: Garou - Bone Gnawer - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Male
Root Beer Charlie.Text: Root Beer Charlie will never join a pack with any single character of Renown 7 or greater.
Root Beer Charlie.Errata: He cannot be in a pack with any renown 7+ Characters.

Surly Redcap.Name: Surly Redcap
Surly Redcap.Text: The Surly Redcap will destroy any single piece of non-Fetish Equipment (Redcap player's choice) at the end of any combat in which he is the attacker.

The Cleaner.Name: The Cleaner
The Cleaner.Text: A specialist in change of 'taking care' of trouble spots. The Cleaner may attack the highest Renown Gaia character or ally at the beginning of each Combat Phase, before alphas are chosen. He is considered armed with a 9mm semi-auto pistol. If disarmed, hi
The Cleaner.Errata: Unique. Attacks his choice of highest renown creature amoungst all Gaian packs. updated 10/13/2015

Tremere Warlock.Name: Tremere Warlock
Tremere Warlock.Text: The Tremere Warlock can use Defiler, 7th Generation, and Wendigo Gifts.

Tribal Warriors.Name: Tribal Warriors
Tribal Warriors.Text: Often misguided, the Tribal Warriors will lend their support to any who pretend to care about their plight. They are considered to be Renown 1 for the purposes of joining a Battlefield conflict.

Twice-Born.Name: Twice-Born
Twice-Born.Text: Twice-Born are reborn spirits of slain mice. Suited to the revelation of secrets, the Twice-Born allow the player of the pack who allies with them to ask any 1 player if he has any 1 specific card in his sept or combat deck. The player must answer truthfu

Unbound Bane.Name: Unbound Bane
Unbound Bane.Text: You may discard the Unbound Bane during any Redraw Phase and bring 1 victim of equal or less Gnosis into your pack as an ally.
Unbound Bane.Errata: Both the Bane and the Victim must be in play. updated 10/13/2015

Unseelie Troll.Name: Unseelie Troll
Unseelie Troll.Text: Having sworn an oath of fealty to Pentex, the Unseelie Troll is a formidable ally indeed. He can use Beast-of-War and Eater-of-Souls Gifts. The Troll is considered to be in Crinos/Battle form.

Verbena Mage.Name: Verbena Mage
Verbena Mage.Text: A master of weaving life-magic, the Verbena Mage allows members of the pack who ally with her to heal Aggravated Damage. The Verbena Mage may use Children of Gaia, Theurge, and Fomori Gifts.
Verbena Mage.Errata: It can use both Iliad Fomori and Odyssey Fomori Gifts

Water Spirit.Name: Water Spirit
Water Spirit.Text: The Water Spirit may heal Aggravated Damage as if it were normal damage. It is unaffected by Gifts.

Wolf Kinfolk.Name: Wolf Kinfolk
Wolf Kinfolk.Text: The wolf Kinfolk is ferocious and loyal.

Wolf-Spirit.Name: Wolf-Spirit
Wolf-Spirit.Text: The Garou can call to duty the spirit of a wolf.  The wolf may take no action during the turn it is summoned.
Wolf-Spirit.Errata: Errata: The Wolf Spirit may play combat actions if it is attacked or part of a pack defense. See rules on what counts as an action vs not an action (2014)

Zlogar The Unrepentant.Name: Zlogar The Unrepentant
Zlogar The Unrepentant.Text: Zlogar the Unrepentant revels in his corrupt state of existence. His Rage is equal to the number of characters in his pack and it decreases accordingly whenever any of them leave play.

Clan of Hyenas.Name: Clan of Hyenas
Clan of Hyenas.Text: Animal. Kinfolk. The Clan of Hyenas will escape combat at the end of any round it took 3 or more damage.

Circular Attack.Name: Circular Attack
Circular Attack.Text: Any attacks directed at the user are either redirected to another character in the same combat, or simply dodged. No character may be forced to damage herself. This card may be played to interrupt and counter 1 round of attacks. Discard this Gift after its effect takes place.
Circular Attack.Errata: Clarification: Play during the redirect step of combat resolution. See rules for more on redirecting damage.

Command Attention.Name: Command Attention
Command Attention.Text: The user has +2 Renown while voting in Juntas. This Gift is permanent until cancelled.

Command Spirit.Name: Command Spirit
Command Spirit.Text: The user may take control of any 1 spirit in play for 1 full turn. The Gift user's Gnosis must exceed the spirit's. Discard this Gift after its effect takes place.

Consumption of Gaia.Name: Consumption of Gaia
Consumption of Gaia.Text: The Gift user can cancel any Gift of 6 or less Gnosis. Discard this Gift after its effect takes place.

Cooking.Name: Cooking
Cooking.Text: Target a combat discard pile and remove one Combat Action from the game. The creature using this Gift takes 2 damage (use this card to mark damage).

Corrupting Presence.Name: Corrupting Presence
Corrupting Presence.Text: The Gift user can raise the Gauntlet of any 1 caern in play by 3. This Gift is permanent until canceled.

Coup De Grace.Name: Coup De Grace
Coup De Grace.Text: During the first round of combat, the user of this Gift may not play damage cards. In any single round thereafter, Coup de Grace may add +4 damage to any 1 attack played by the user. Discard this Gift after its effect takes place.
Coup De Grace.Errata: Clarification: May be played after the first round of combat, so long as you played a block or dodge round 1."

Crawling Poison.Name: Crawling Poison
Crawling Poison.Text: Attach this Gift to the user. Her next successful attack does +1 damage. Attach this Gift to the damage card to mark this. While attached, the victim cannot regenerate. If it is a creature of a type that does not regenerate, it acts at -3 Rage.

Curse of Aeolus.Name: Curse of Aeolus
Curse of Aeolus.Text: Play at the beginning of combat. You summon a creeping, choking fog. Your opponents are all considered -2 Rage for the first round of combat. If this drops their Rage to one or less, the affected opponents are removed from the combat.

Curse of Hatred.Name: Curse of Hatred
Curse of Hatred.Text: The character looks into his opponent's eyes and focuses his hatred, disheartening his foe. The target plays her next Combat Action at -2 Rage. Discard this Gift after its effect takes place.

Deep Journey.Name: Deep Journey
Deep Journey.Text: When in the Umbra, a character can use this Gift which allows the player to search through her sept deck and bring any one caern, totem, spirit ally, or fetish directly into play. Reshuffle your sept deck after using this Gift. This Gift is discarded afte
Deep Journey.Errata: This may fetch Bane Fetishes. Errata: Place the item you searched for in your hand.

Devoted Servant.Name: Devoted Servant
Devoted Servant.Text: The Wyrm has noticed the Gift user's devotion to the cause and his pack. He cannot be removed from play or from his pack unless he allows himself to be removed. This Gift lasts until canceled.

Disquiet.Name: Disquiet
Disquiet.Text: The Gift user sends the target fleeing from the area. Remove one Ally or Prey creature in Homid form from play for one full turn. If the target has Gnosis 3 or less it is discarded instead. Discard this Gift after use.

Disembowelment.Name: Disembowelment
Disembowelment.Text: Your victim plays Combat Actions at -1 Rage until this wound is healed.

Fox Frenzy.Name: Fox Frenzy
Fox Frenzy.Text: Play this card between rounds of combat or before the first round of combat. A character in a fox frenzy tucks tail and heads for the hills, removing that character from combat. Fox Frenzy may be cancelled like a frenzy, and may not be used by frenzied ch
Fox Frenzy.Errata: Is a limited frenzy. If the Fox Frenzied Character is somehow prevented from leaving combat, it does NOT gain any of the benefits of a Full frenzy."

Frenzy.Name: Frenzy
Frenzy.Text: Play this card on a character you control, either before the first round of a combat (including right after a challenge has been accepted) or between rounds of a combat. The character immediately enters frenzy.
Frenzy.Errata: Clarification: This puts the Character in Full Frenzy.  See Frenzy rules.

Fur Gnarl.Name: Fur Gnarl
Fur Gnarl.Text: If the victim takes this wound in Crinos form, this damage is aggravated.
Fur Gnarl.Errata: If the creature is not in Crinos/battle form when this wound is delivered, then the wound is not aggravated. If it was in Crinos when it received this, it is aggravated, even if the creature later shifts to breed form."

Gang Beating.Name: Gang Beating
Gang Beating.Text: Play when a single character of yours is fighting 2 or more opponents. The single character draws 1 additional combat card per opponent he's facing and can play up to 3 Combat Actions per round of combat. Gang Beating cannot be played for a character who
Gang Beating.Errata: You may not play Gang Beating and then add additional packmates to the combat later. The creature must go it alone. 6/27/2015

Get Medieval.Name: Get Medieval
Get Medieval.Text: Play this card when you kill an opponent who has slain a member of your pack. The opponent lingers on as you go to work with a pair of pliers and a blowtorch. The victim is removed from play at the end of the combat. This card is worth 2 Victory points.

Hamstringed.Name: Hamstringed
Hamstringed.Text: Your opponent cannot withdraw or escape during the next round of combat.

Head or Gut ?.Name: Head or Gut ?
Head or Gut ?.Text: You offer your opponent a choice as to where on his body he'd like to be slugged. If you kill your opponent with Head or Gut, place this card in your victory pile for +1 victory points.
Head or Gut ?.Errata: This must be the killing blow to take effect. If a Prey Creature kills someone with a Head or Gut, HoG has no special effect."

Head Wound.Name: Head Wound
Head Wound.Text: A victim damaged by this attack may not play any Combat Actions during the next round of combat.
Head Wound.Errata: Clarification: If you were wounded with a Head Wound and are the attacker, you may withdraw between rounds (unless otherwise prevented from withdrawing)."

Heart Breaker.Name: Heart Breaker
Heart Breaker.Text: When all else fails... punch right through some chump's sternum and give his heart a wrenching. This card cannot be bluffed.

Hunting Party.Name: Hunting Party
Hunting Party.Text: Play when your character is declaring an attack. For attacks against nonalpha characters, Hunting Party must be played before the challenge is accepted or declined. Select members of your pack to join the attack. You can have a total of 15 Renown of characters in the attack (including the original character). Draw 1 additional combat card per additional pack member.
Hunting Party.Errata: Clarification: You play Hunting Party when you declare an attack; creatures may step in after the attack has been declared so would have to face your pack.

Instinctive Attack.Name: Instinctive Attack
Instinctive Attack.Text: Instinctive. This card cannot be used by Homid form creatures or with a firearm. If this creature is prevented from playing a Combat Action, it may play Instinctive Attack after a round's combat cards are revealed. Treat Instinctive Attack as if it were p

Gere Hunts-the Hunters.Name: Gere Hunts-the Hunters
Gere Hunts-the Hunters.Keywords: Garou - Get of Fenris - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Male
Gere Hunts-the Hunters.Text: Gere's pelt has a scar fetish, which gives him strong health.  Any Garou who kills Gere can wear his pelt and gain +2 Health, but will suffer -4 Renown.
Gere Hunts-the Hunters.Errata: He may use Rite of Scarification. If someone kills Gere and wears his pelt after he's played Rite of Scarification, it still only grants +2 Health. Errata: Gere's pelt is considered built-in fetish non-armor equipment (see Equipment rules) (Revised 2014)"

Gesar.Name: Gesar
Gesar.Keywords: Garou - Stargazers - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Male
Gesar.Text: If Gesar is your alpha, he is considered Renown 2 for purposes of taking his alpha action.

Ghiyath.Name: Ghiyath
Ghiyath.Keywords: Garou - Silent Striders - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
Ghiyath.Text: If one of your packmembers is attacked outside the Combat Phase, Ghiyath may automatically pack defend with them if they are of lower Renown. Draw a combat card when this occurs.

Gloom At Midnight.Name: Gloom At Midnight
Gloom At Midnight.Keywords: Garou - Fianna - Ragabash - Lupus - Gaia - Silver Pack - Female
Gloom At Midnight.Text: Silver Pack. Gloom-at-Midnight lives in a state of Harano and may never be forced not to take an action. She is -5 Renown for voting in Moots.

Golgol Fangs-First.Name: Golgol Fangs-First
Golgol Fangs-First.Keywords: Garou - Get of Fenris - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Male
Golgol Fangs-First.Text: Golgol draws 1 extra combat card for any attack or defense he assists.
Golgol Fangs-First.Errata: Errata: Golgol's ability works whenever he becomes part of a pack action.

Goll Mac Mourna.Name: Goll Mac Mourna
Goll Mac Mourna.Keywords: Garou - Fianna - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Male
Goll Mac Mourna.Text: No spirits can declare an attack on Goll.

Gorgol.Name: Gorgol
Gorgol.Keywords: Bane - Homid - Eater-of-Souls - Wyrm - Dark Trinity - Male
Gorgol.Text: Dark Trinity. Gorgol always shapeshifts when he steps sideways. He cannot step sideways if it would kill him. Gorgol may automatically pack attack or defend with members of the Dark Trinity. Draw a combat card when this occurs.

Grandfather Bannion.Name: Grandfather Bannion
Grandfather Bannion.Keywords: Garou - Bone Gnawer - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Male
Grandfather Bannion.Text: Members of Bannion's pack may begin the game equipped with .38 Special,

Grek Twice-Tongue.Name: Grek Twice-Tongue
Grek Twice-Tongue.Keywords: Garou - Silent Striders - Philodox - Metis - Gaia - Male
Grek Twice-Tongue.Text: Despite his Metis breed, Grek is considered +1 Renown for moot voting.

Greyfist.Name: Greyfist
Greyfist.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
Greyfist.Text: Proud and strong, Greyfist is less affected by Harano than most.  If a Harano Gloom card is played on Greyfist, he may discard it at the beginning of his next turn.

Grimfang.Name: Grimfang
Grimfang.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Male
Grimfang.Text: Grimfang is considered +3 Renown for moot voting.

Grimm Brings-Blood.Name: Grimm Brings-Blood
Grimm Brings-Blood.Keywords: Garou - Glass Walkers - Ahroun - Metis - Gaia - Male
Grimm Brings-Blood.Text: Overcome with bitterness, Grimm has succumbed to Harano. He automatically frenzies against any Silver Fangs opponents. Rivalry: Silver Fangs.

Growls-at-Moon.Name: Growls-at-Moon
Growls-at-Moon.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Galliard - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Growls-at-Moon.Text: Territorial of her pack's grounds, Growl-at-Moon can automatically pack defend when any nonalpha packmate is attacked.

Guides-to-Truth.Name: Guides-to-Truth
Guides-to-Truth.Keywords: Garou - Uktena - Theurge - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Guides-to-Truth.Text: Twice per game, Guides-to-Truth allows you to look at an opponent's sept or combat hand.

Gunther Odd-Eye.Name: Gunther Odd-Eye
Gunther Odd-Eye.Keywords: Garou - Get of Fenris - Ragabash - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Gunther Odd-Eye.Text: Opponents with less than 7 Gnosis cannot target Gunther with Gifts.

Hackles High.Name: Hackles High
Hackles High.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Ahroun - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Hackles High.Text: The only survivor from her litter, Hackles High doesn't intend to ever stop surviving. She may ignore the effects of Combat Actions that would force her to skip playing a Combat Action. Loyalty: Red Talons

Harmon Truefriend.Name: Harmon Truefriend
Harmon Truefriend.Keywords: Garou - Children of Gaia - Ahroun - Metis - Gaia - Male
Harmon Truefriend.Text: Harmon is never affected by any Gift that would force him into another pack, even if only temporarily.

Harold Zettler.Name: Harold Zettler
Harold Zettler.Keywords: Vampire - Pentex - Executive - Homid - Defiler - Board of Director - Wyrm - Male
Harold Zettler.Text: Defiler. Vampire. Board of Directors. Once per turn he may cancel one Board Meeting before it is voted on. If Harold uses this ability, he may not vote in Juntas this turn. He may use 7th Generation, Odyssey Fomori, and Fianna Gifts.  Regenerates.

Haunts-the-Skyline.Name: Haunts-the-Skyline
Haunts-the-Skyline.Keywords: Garou - Glass Walkers - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Male
Haunts-the-Skyline.Text: Haunts imbues all of his Equipment with spiritual energy. All Equipment he possesses is considered Fetish Equipment. He has +1 Gnosis for each piece of Equipment he possesses (limit +3.).

Horse Feathers.Name: Horse Feathers
Horse Feathers.Keywords: Garou - Uktena - Ragabash - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Horse Feathers.Text: Horse Feathers was once a Banetender. Bane Fetishes cannot target her, and do not work at all if she is in combat with their owner.

Howard Koar.Name: Howard Koar
Howard Koar.Keywords: Garou - Stargazers - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Male
Howard Koar.Text: When Howard takes damage that turns him into Crinos but does not kill him, he immediately frenzies.

Howls Like Thunder.Name: Howls Like Thunder
Howls Like Thunder.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Ahroun - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Howls Like Thunder.Text: Howls Like Thunder is a legend among lupus Garou. No lupus breed character will ever attack him, though they may defend themselves if attacked. Howls Like Thunder will never use Equipment.
Howls Like Thunder.Errata: Red Talons with a Pine Cone still won't attack him, even if wounded."

Hunter of the East.Name: Hunter of the East
Hunter of the East.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Philodox - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Hunter of the East.Text: Once per game, Hunter may ask a Silver Fangs to give a piece of Equipment to a target character. If it does so, place a sept card from your discard pile face down in that player's Victory Pile where it is worth 1 Victory Point.

Hunts-At-Night.Name: Hunts-At-Night
Hunts-At-Night.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Ragabash - Lupus - Defiler - Wyrm - Male
Hunts-At-Night.Text: Opponents cannot pack attack Hunts-At-Night, nor can they pack defend if Hunts-At-Night attacks them. Hunts cannot participate in any pack actions.
Hunts-At-Night.Errata: Hunts at Night cannot step in or replace creatures. errata: male

Ivan Korda.Name: Ivan Korda
Ivan Korda.Keywords: Garou - Shadow Lords - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
Ivan Korda.Text: Ivan is a master of blackmail.  For any moot that Ivan's pack calls, Ivan can cause one other character in play to have -2 Renown for voting.
Ivan Korda.Errata: Clarification: For each moot Ivan's pack calls, he can select one other character to have -2 Renown for voting on that Moot. (2014)"

Jacky Gecko.Name: Jacky Gecko
Jacky Gecko.Keywords: Garou - Uktena - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Male
Jacky Gecko.Text: Jacky can start the game equipped with either the .38 Special or the 9mm Semi-Auto pistol Equipment cards.

Jane Thurber.Name: Jane Thurber
Jane Thurber.Keywords: Human - Cults - 7th Generation - Homid - Defiler - Medical Caste - Wyrm - Female
Jane Thurber.Text: Jane can use Theurge and Children of Gaia Gifts.

Janus.Name: Janus
Janus.Keywords: Garou - Black Fury - Philodox - Metis - Gaia - Male
Janus.Text: A rarity among the Black Furies, Janus is male. He may automatically pack defend with any Black Furies in his pack in the interests of proving his tribal loyalty. Do not draw any extra cards if Janus joins a pack action in this way.
Janus.Errata: If another Black Fury joins a pack defense, Janus may then join the defense with that Fury, even if the Fury was not the original target."

Jason O'Kelly.Name: Jason O'Kelly
Jason O'Kelly.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Ragabash - Homid - Eater-of-Souls - Wyrm - Male
Jason O'Kelly.Text: Jason is misanthropic; he hates everyone and everything. He will never join a pack action, nor will he step in to defend an Enemy. If he had it his way, he wouldn't even join a pack. He may use Ragabash Gifts in addition to his normal Gifts.

Jennifer Moon Wizened.Name: Jennifer Moon Wizened
Jennifer Moon Wizened.Keywords: Garou - Children of Gaia - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Female
Jennifer Moon Wizened.Text: In addition to her regular Gifts, Jennifer can use Theurge Gifts.

John Hidden-Moon.Name: John Hidden-Moon
John Hidden-Moon.Keywords: Garou - Wendigo - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Kailindo - Male
John Hidden-Moon.Text: Kailindo. John was born under an eclipsed Full Moon. He may only frenzy during a Lunar Eclipse, and he may still use his Ahroun Gifts during the Lunar Eclipse.

Johnathan Roark.Name: Johnathan Roark
Johnathan Roark.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Ragabash - Homid - Defiler - Wyrm - Male

Johnson P. Donnovan.Name: Johnson P. Donnovan
Johnson P. Donnovan.Keywords: Human - Cults - 7th Generation - Beast-of-War - Business Caste - Homid - Wyrm - Male
Johnson P. Donnovan.Text: Once per turn, (except during combat) Johnson allows you to search through your sept deck and equip him with any 1 piece of non-fetish Equipment. Reshuffle your sept deck when finished.

Jorge Bolivar.Name: Jorge Bolivar
Jorge Bolivar.Keywords: Garou - Children of Gaia - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Silver Pack - Male
Jorge Bolivar.Text: Silver Pack. Jorge is renowned as a fair and just mediator. Once per game, he may cancel any Moot that has been voted on and passed, but has not taken effect yet (before the end of the Moot Phase). He may use Gifts of any breed.

Joseph Roars-as-Bull.Name: Joseph Roars-as-Bull
Joseph Roars-as-Bull.Keywords: Garou - Uktena - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Male
Joseph Roars-as-Bull.Text: Joseph draws 1 additional combat card when he is the attacker.

Jubati.Name: Jubati
Jubati.Keywords: Garou - Uktena - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Male
Jubati.Text: When battling Pentex enemies, Jubati can draw 1 extra combat card.
Jubati.Errata: Clarification: Jubati's ability works whenever he enters combat against a Pentex enemy. (2014)

Judas.Name: Judas
Judas.Keywords: Odyssey - Fomori - Pentex - Homid - Defiler - Wyrm - Male
Judas.Text: Defiler. Once a turn, Judas may cancel an Auspice or Aspect Gift with a Gnosis requirement less than or equal to his Gnosis. Judas cannot use this ability during the Combat Phase or two turns in a row.

Juicy Johnes.Name: Juicy Johnes
Juicy Johnes.Keywords: Iliad - Fomori - Pentex - Homid - Wyrm - Male
Juicy Johnes.Text: Juicy subtracts 2 Gnosis from whoever kills him. This Gnosis penalty lasts until the end of the game.

Juki, 'Sun Halo'\tTheWarOfTheAmazon\trag.Name:
Juki, 'Sun Halo'	TheWarOfTheAmazon	rage.image.garou.juki.sun.halo,rage.image.crinos.juki.sun.halo	[GW-Ch][GU-Ch]	Character - Gaia			Mokole - Homid - Gaia - Male	2	1	3	1	1	3	2		Wyrm creatures in combat against Juki act at -1 Rage.	
Julisha of the Thousand Masks	Unlimited	rage.image.garou.julisha.of.the.thousand.masks,rage.image.crinos.julisha.of.the.thousand.masks	[GC-Ch][GM-Ch][GW-Ch]	Character - Gaia			Garou - Black Fury - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Female	9	2	8	3	8	8	8		Every kill Julisha makes after her first is worth +1 victory Renown.	Clarification: Her ability applies only to kill she makes herself, not kills made by packmates in a pack action with her.

Kabula.Name: Kabula
Kabula.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Ahroun - Homid - Eater-of-Souls - Wyrm - Female
Kabula.Text: Eater-of-Souls. Kabula's aggressive behavior frightens other Black Spiral Dancers; they may not refuse her challenges. If Kabula is unwounded and the highest Renown Garou in your pack she must be alpha.

Kelly Brounard.Name: Kelly Brounard
Kelly Brounard.Keywords: Garou - Glass Walkers - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Female
Kelly Brounard.Text: Kelly will only be alpha if she is the only character left in her pack. Vampire Allies of Kelly's pack gain +1 Rage.
Kelly Brounard.Errata: See Faq entry on can't versus must effects.

Kills-the-Weak.Name: Kills-the-Weak
Kills-the-Weak.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Ahroun - Metis - Defiler - Wyrm - Male
Kills-the-Weak.Text: Kills-the-Weak will not attack an opponent of higher Renown, but can defend himself if attacked.

King Albrecht.Name: King Albrecht
King Albrecht.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Male - (Fast Striking)
King Albrecht.Text: Jonas Albrecht has become the King of the Silver Fangs. When in combat with Wyrm creatures, Albrecht's Combat Actions are always resolved first. He may begin play equipped with a Grand Klaive. Rivalry: Margrave Koneitzko.

Kitalid the Deceiver.Name: Kitalid the Deceiver
Kitalid the Deceiver.Text: Characters and allies whose Gnosis is greater than 2 but less than 8 can't attack Kitalid. They can, however, defend themselves if Kitalid attacks them.

Lamurun.Name: Lamurun
Lamurun.Keywords: Garou - Uktena - Philodox - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Lamurun.Text: Lamurun can discard any card from his victory pile and draw any 1 card from his sept discard pile into his sept hand.
Lamurun.Errata: Errata: He may only use his ability once per turn.

Latonia The Temptress.Name: Latonia The Temptress
Latonia The Temptress.Text: Latonia can force her opponents to discard their combat hand and redraw. This can be done once per combat, right before the actual combat begins.
Latonia The Temptress.Errata: Clarification: Latonia's ability can only be used in the beginning-of-combat step. Hands are redrawn to the same number of cards as before the ability was used. If in combat against Prey, all players that may play for Prey discard and redraw their hands."

Laughs-at-Death.Name: Laughs-at-Death
Laughs-at-Death.Text: When alpha, and in the Umbra, Laughs-at-Death must be challenged by those who wish to attack her. She has the option of declining. Laughs can use any Ragabash or Uktena Gifts. Laughs cannot frenzy.
Laughs-at-Death.Errata: CLARIFICATION: If Laughs is challenged by a creature whose challenges are unrefusable, she must accept the challenge."

Leila the Veil-Shredder.Name: Leila the Veil-Shredder
Leila the Veil-Shredder.Keywords: Garou - Glass Walkers - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Female
Leila the Veil-Shredder.Text: Leila's upbringing has made her both strong and flawed. She may ignore requirements on Action cards. Actions and Combat Actions she plays may never be cancelled. She will never play Breed Gifts.

Little Petey.Name: Little Petey
Little Petey.Keywords: Iliad - Fomori - Pentex - Homid - Defiler - Wyrm - Male
Little Petey.Text: Little Petey cannot use any Gifts.

Lone Wolf Circles.Name: Lone Wolf Circles
Lone Wolf Circles.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Philodox - Metis - Gaia - Male
Lone Wolf Circles.Text: After cards are revealed in the first round of combat, Lone may choose to cancel his combat action and dodge any one combat action played against him. He may not participate in Pack Actions.

Longtooth Soulkiller.Name: Longtooth Soulkiller
Longtooth Soulkiller.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Galliard - Metis - Defiler - Wyrm - Male
Longtooth Soulkiller.Text: Longtooth can use 7th Generation Gifts as well as his normal ones.

Lord Albrecht.Name: Lord Albrecht
Lord Albrecht.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Male
Lord Albrecht.Text: Any Wyrm creature of Renown value 4 or greater that are killed by Albrecht or in pack combat involving Albrecht are worth +1 Renown for victory points.

Lorenz Winkler.Name: Lorenz Winkler
Lorenz Winkler.Keywords: Human - Cults - 7th Generation - Defiler - Medical Caste - Wyrm - Male
Lorenz Winkler.Text: Lorenz can remove any 1 damage card from any 1 member of his pack (including himself) during each Regeneration Phase.
Lorenz Winkler.Errata: CLARIFICATION: Lorenz may heal a damage card on any 1 packmember during Regeneration phase

Lotus.Name: Lotus
Lotus.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Philodox - Metis - Eater-of-Souls - Wyrm - Female
Lotus.Text: Lotus is slightly inbred; she cannot frenzy.

Mamu.Name: Mamu
Mamu.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Ahroun - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Mamu.Text: When Mamu is killed, he immediately frenzies, but draws only 3 additional combat cards for the death frenzy.  Combat continues as Mamu tries to take his killers with him to the grave.
Mamu.Errata: Clarification: This is a limited frenzy. He won't enter this limited frenzy if he's already frenzied. (2014)

Margrave Konietzko.Name: Margrave Konietzko
Margrave Konietzko.Keywords: Garou - Shadow Lords - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Male
Margrave Konietzko.Text: The Margrave does not take kindly to those who oppose him. If a Moot he calls fails, he may take an additional alpha action during the next Combat Phase. Rivalry: Lord/King Albrecht.

Mari Cabrah.Name: Mari Cabrah
Mari Cabrah.Keywords: Garou - Black Fury - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Female
Mari Cabrah.Text: Mari has +1 Rage when she is on the attacking side of a combat.

Mari Cabrah 2.Name: Mari Cabrah 2
Mari Cabrah 2.Keywords: Garou - Black Fury - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Female
Mari Cabrah 2.Text: Hardened by her struggles against the Wyrm, Mari has learned much during the days of the imminent Apocalypse. She gains +2 Rage when on the attacking side of a combat.

Markhat.Name: Markhat
Markhat.Text: Markat will not under any circumstances join a pack with Get of Fenris, Shadow Lords, or Silver Fangs.
Markhat.Errata: If an effect forces Markhat into a pack with Get of Fenris, Shadow Lords, or Silver Fangs (example: Eye of the Cobra), discard Markhat. 11/30/15"

Markus Rage-Like-Fire.Name: Markus Rage-Like-Fire
Markus Rage-Like-Fire.Keywords: Garou - Get of Fenris - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
Markus Rage-Like-Fire.Text: Markus preaches against senseless and vain attacks on the Wyrm. Once per game, he may call a Renown 9 Moot which, if passed, will remove any single card from any Gaia pack's victory pile.

Matfei Past-Glory.Name: Matfei Past-Glory
Matfei Past-Glory.Keywords: Metis - Silver Fangs - Garou - Ahroun - Gaia - Male
Matfei Past-Glory.Text: Matfei cannot gain Gnosis, step sideways, or recruit spirit Allies.

Maxmillian.Name: Maxmillian
Maxmillian.Keywords: Human - Cults - 7th Generation - Homid - Beast-of-War - Warrior Caste - Wyrm - Male
Maxmillian.Text: Max may begin the game armed with either a 9mm Semi-Auto Pistol or a Flak Jacket.

Melody Truthsinger.Name: Melody Truthsinger
Melody Truthsinger.Keywords: Garou - Children of Gaia - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Female
Melody Truthsinger.Text: Esteemed by many young Garou, Melody's rational nature has earned her numerous friends. Once per game, Melody may cause all Garou of her Renown and lower to vote as she does for 1 Moot Phase.
Melody Truthsinger.Errata: If more than one Melody is in play, the first one to use her ability will force the other Melody's to vote as she wants."

Michael the Lost.Name: Michael the Lost
Michael the Lost.Keywords: Human - Cults - 7th Generation - Homid - Beast-of-War - Business Caste - Wyrm - Male
Michael the Lost.Text: Beast-of-War. Business Caste. Michael may start the game equipped with one piece of non-Unique, non-Restricted Equipment. It can not be Equipment he could not ordinarily equip.

Miles Kent.Name: Miles Kent
Miles Kent.Keywords: Human - Cults - 7th Generation - Homid - Eater-of-Souls - Government Caste - Wyrm - Male
Miles Kent.Text: Miles' alpha can decline any attacks if she has killed a victim in the Hunting Grounds during the current turn.

Mizrait.Name: Mizrait
Mizrait.Keywords: Garou - Stargazers - Philodox - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Mizrait.Text: Mizrait may, as his alpha action, force another alpha to declare their alpha action against a target of Mizrait's choice. He may only do this if the alpha in Question has not yet taken her alpha action.
Mizrait.Errata: If there are multiple copies of the same creature in play, Mizrait selects a specific one as the target. If the creature is killed before the targetted Alpha takes his action, that Alpha takes no action this turn. It will not attack a different creature s"

Modi Votishal.Name: Modi Votishal
Modi Votishal.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Galliard - Metis - Gaia - Silver Pack - Male
Modi Votishal.Text: Silver Pack. If Modi uses a Gift that affects himself, that Gift may never be canceled.

Morgan.Name: Morgan
Morgan.Text: Corrupted by greed and powerlust, this wereshark now serves the Wyrm. When in combat, Morgan may enter a frenzy during any round in which he and his opponent both took 3 or more points of damage.
Morgan.Errata: If Morgan's special ability is triggered by damage that would kill him, he still frenzies. CLARIFICATION: Morgan's special frenzy is a Full Frenzy."

Morgan the Unworthy.Name: Morgan the Unworthy
Morgan the Unworthy.Keywords: Garou - Fianna - Philodox - Metis - Gaia - Male
Morgan the Unworthy.Text: Born mad as a hatter, Morgan has embraced the half moon of his birth sign.  Every time Morgan uses a Gift or Rite decide randomly whether it works or is discarded (equal chance for each).

Morihei High-Mountain.Name: Morihei High-Mountain
Morihei High-Mountain.Keywords: Garou - Stargazers - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Kailindo - Male

Mother Larissa.Name: Mother Larissa
Mother Larissa.Keywords: Garou - Bone Gnawer - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Female
Mother Larissa.Text: Larissa is a resourceful old biddy.  You may draw 2 extra combat cards whenever she is the target of an attack.  Discard or redraw to your normal combat hand size after combat.

Mr. Iguana.Name: Mr. Iguana
Mr. Iguana.Keywords: Iliad - Fomori - Pentex - Homid - Eater-of-Souls - Wyrm - Male
Mr. Iguana.Text: Mr. Iguana handles many of Pentex's 'special' projects.

Mugshot.Name: Mugshot
Mugshot.Keywords: Iliad - Fomori - Pentex - Homid - Beast-of-War - Wyrm - Male
Mugshot.Text: Beast-of-War. Mugshot is a walking mound of muscle... with an itty-bitty brain. He may not vote in Board Meetings.

Nadia Wyrmfoe.Name: Nadia Wyrmfoe
Nadia Wyrmfoe.Keywords: Garou - Shadow Lords - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Female
Nadia Wyrmfoe.Text: Nadia cannot bind a Bane spirit.

Naomi.Name: Naomi
Naomi.Keywords: Garou - Uktena - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Female
Naomi.Text: At the controlling player's option, Naomi can begin any game in the Umbra. Naomi cannot be in a pack with any other Uktena.

Natasha Moon Chaser.Name: Natasha Moon Chaser
Natasha Moon Chaser.Keywords: Garou - Silent Striders - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Female
Natasha Moon Chaser.Text: Once per game, a player can speak the name Baba Yaga and Natasha will forfeit a declared attack in paranoid pursuit of the Hag.
Natasha Moon Chaser.Errata: Errata: The combat is cancelled during the pre-combat step. Natasha's owner may use Baba Yaga to cancel one of Natasha's attacks.  (Revised 2014)

Nephthys Mu'at.Name: Nephthys Mu'at
Nephthys Mu'at.Keywords: Garou - Silent Striders - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Female
Nephthys Mu'at.Text: Nepthys knows Garou society.  She allows you to inspect either side of any Garou character card in play.

No'iri'n Ni' Dhonaill.Name: No'iri'n Ni' Dhonaill
No'iri'n Ni' Dhonaill.Keywords: Garou - Fianna - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Female
No'iri'n Ni' Dhonaill.Text: No'iri'n can use Lupus Gifts as well as Homid.

Nuntisiwas The Dreamreaver.Name: Nuntisiwas The Dreamreaver
Nuntisiwas The Dreamreaver.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Ragabash - Homid - Eater-of-Souls - Wyrm - Male
Nuntisiwas The Dreamreaver.Text: All attacks by Gaia characters on Nuntisiwas are considered challenges. He may use Ragabash Gifts. Rivalry: Allonzo Montoya.

Nwinda Moonsilver.Name: Nwinda Moonsilver
Nwinda Moonsilver.Keywords: Garou - Silent Striders - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Silver Pack - Male
Nwinda Moonsilver.Text: Silver Pack. All Theurges in Nwinda's pack besides himself gain +1 Gnosis as long as he is in play. Nwinda and his packmates are unaffected by Mass Pollutions.

Olakunde.Name: Olakunde
Olakunde.Keywords: Garou - Glass Walkers - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Male
Olakunde.Text: Olakunde's birth was foretold in the stars. Members of his pack act at +1 Gnosis when equipping Fetishes.

Old One-Eye.Name: Old One-Eye
Old One-Eye.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Theurge - Lupus - Eater-of-Souls - Wyrm - Male
Old One-Eye.Text: If Old One-Eye is killed, you may transfer any of his Equipment to a pack member of your choice, who must still meet any special requirements in order to use it.
Old One-Eye.Errata: CLARIFICATION: Old One Eye may trade his Equipment to a packmember if he dies. This follows standard trading rules. 6/27/2014

Old Storm-Chaser.Name: Old Storm-Chaser
Old Storm-Chaser.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Theurge - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Old Storm-Chaser.Text: When in play, Old Storm-Chaser increases your sept hand size by 1.

Oriel Paolma.Name: Oriel Paolma
Oriel Paolma.Keywords: Garou - Black Fury - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Female
Oriel Paolma.Text: Oriel gains +1 Rage for each Renown 1 packmate that is in a pack action with her. She cannot gain more than +3 Rage this way.

Passer.Name: Passer
Passer.Keywords: Garou - Silent Striders - Theurge - Metis - Gaia - Male
Passer.Text: Passer has just begun serving his tribe as a scout against the Wyrm.  He is worth zero Renown for victory points.

Pearl River.Name: Pearl River
Pearl River.Keywords: Garou - Children of Gaia - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Female
Pearl River.Text: Pearl is considered +2 Renown for moot voting.

Petrov Tzarovitch.Name: Petrov Tzarovitch
Petrov Tzarovitch.Text: When in the Umbra, Petrov can escape from any combat he is in after the third round.  Petrov can use Ragabash, Theurge and Silent Striders Gifts.

Urban Renewal.Name: Urban Renewal
Urban Renewal.Text: Alphas cannot attack the Hunting Grounds this turn. Urban Renewal cannot be played to prevent an attack which has already been declared.

Visit from White Father.Name: Visit from White Father
Visit from White Father.Text: Few are privileged to get a visit from White Father. The legendary Amazonian war leader comes to rally the troops. The pack with the fewest Victory Points draws two sept cards. If there is a tie for fewest Victory Points, all packs involved in the tie dra
Visit from White Father.Errata: Original: Very few are privileged to get a visit from White Father. The visited pack draws 2 additional sept cards when this Event is played.

Weasel.Name: Weasel
Weasel.Text: Weasel is a cunning totem of war, granting his children agility in battle. At the beginning of the Combat Phase, a character with Weasel may discard 1 of her combat cards and search through her combat deck for a Dodge. This must be done before alphas are
Weasel.Errata: You may only look for the card Dodge, not Evasion, Fancy Footwork, only the actual card 'Dodge'."

Wendigo.Name: Wendigo
Wendigo.Text: Increase your combat hand by 1. A pack may not have more than 1 Pack Totem at any time.
Wendigo.Errata: You must wait until the next time you refill your combat hand to draw your extra combat card.

Whippoorwill.Name: Whippoorwill
Whippoorwill.Text: When a Victim or Ally is removed or discarded from play and put in a discard pile, you may instead put it face down in your Victory Pile where it is worth 1 Victory Point. If multiple packs have Whipporwill in play, only the pack with the least Victory Po

Whippoorwill (2).Name: Whippoorwill (2)
Whippoorwill (2).Text: When a Victim or Ally is removed or discarded from play and put in a discard pile, you may instead put it face down in your Victory Pile where it is worth 1 Victory Point. If multiple packs have Whipporwill in play, only the pack with the least Victory Po

Wyldstorm.Name: Wyldstorm
Wyldstorm.Text: Each player selects his highest Renown character, discarding any Gifts or Equipment it may have. These characters are then shuffled together and randomly distributed to all players. For the remainder of the game, each character is part of a new pack. Char
Wyldstorm.Errata: Includes Character temporarily removed from play. If any of the selected Characters are in Combat, that combat immediately ends. If the highest renown Character is dead because of Wyldstorm, it is shuffled in and someone ends up with a dead Character. Wyl"

Wyrm Taint.Name: Wyrm Taint
Wyrm Taint.Text: Evidence surfaces implicating the Glass Walkers tribe in dealings with the Wyrm. All Glass Walkers act at -1 Renown during moots.

Hatii the Thunderer.Name: Hatii the Thunderer
Hatii the Thunderer.Text: Hatii grants his followers boundless stamina.  Whenever your combat hand is empty at the end of a round of combat, you may draw 1 combat card.

Rewards of Leadership.Name: Rewards of Leadership
Rewards of Leadership.Text: Play after you win a Junta you called.  You may search your deck for one Ally, Equipment or Territory card and place it in your hand.  You may play Equipment, Allies and Territories in your hand at the start of the next Combat Phase before Alphas are chos

Aegis.Name: Aegis
Aegis.Text: The Gift user is surrounded by a tangible air of invulnerability. She gains +2 Renown during moots and +2 Health. This Gift lasts until canceled.

Air of Authority.Name: Air of Authority
Air of Authority.Text: The Gift user can end any 1 combat of her choice. Discard this Gift after its effect takes place.

Phreak.Name: Phreak
Phreak.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Ragabash - Metis - Defiler - Wyrm - Male
Phreak.Text: Phreak has a puny Crinos form. He may use Equipment that is only usable in Homid form, though he is considered to be in Crinos form (he is a Metis, after all).

Pietr Windstride.Name: Pietr Windstride
Pietr Windstride.Keywords: Garou - Stargazers - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Kailindo - Male
Pietr Windstride.Text: Kailindo. Pietr is constantly on the move. He may not be alpha for two successive turns.

Prentice Turner.Name: Prentice Turner
Prentice Turner.Keywords: Human - Pentex - Executive - Homid - Beast-of-War - Wyrm - Male
Prentice Turner.Text: A morale officer, Prentice gives each member of his pack +1 Rage while he is in play.

Questor.Name: Questor
Questor.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Galliard - Lupus - Beast-of-War - Wyrm - Male
Questor.Text: Questor has been seduced by the evil influence of the Wyrm. He gains +1 victory points each time he kills a Victim from the Hunting Grounds.

Questor Treetalker.Name: Questor Treetalker
Questor Treetalker.Keywords: Garou - Children of Gaia - Galliard - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Questor Treetalker.Text: When Questor declares an attack against an opponent in the Hunting Grounds, his howls can call one other packmate to join the attack.

Ragnor the Terror.Name: Ragnor the Terror
Ragnor the Terror.Keywords: Bane - Pentex - Homid - Eater-of-Souls - Wyrm - Team #21 - Male
Ragnor the Terror.Text: Ragnor is a member of Pentex First Team #21. He can pack attack or defend with any other member of Team #21 in his pack.

Rahm Izad.Name: Rahm Izad
Rahm Izad.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Theurge - Metis - Defiler - Wyrm - Male
Rahm Izad.Text: Rahm Izad is raving mad. He has a hard time distinguishing between inflicting damage on himself or his opponent. All damage done to him aggravated.

Rainpuddle.Name: Rainpuddle
Rainpuddle.Keywords: Garou - Stargazers - Theurge - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Rainpuddle.Text: Rainpuddle's attacks can affect anything in the Umbra.
Rainpuddle.Errata: Clarification: Rainpuddle can declare attacks against creatures in the Umbra. See Incarna Sigil. (2014)

Raza.Name: Raza
Raza.Keywords: Bane - Lupus - Beast-of-War - Wyrm - Dark Trinity - Female
Raza.Text: Dark Trinity. Raza cannot regenerate two turns in a row. She may automatically pack attack with other members of the Dark Trinity. Draw two extra combat cards when this occurs. She will not join pack defenses.

Rends-the-Innocent.Name: Rends-the-Innocent
Rends-the-Innocent.Keywords: Garou - Black Spiral Dancer - Galliard - Homid - Defiler - Wyrm - Male
Rends-the-Innocent.Text: Rends-the-Innocent can use Galliard Gifts in addition to his normal ones.

Rheya Wrath-of-Heaven.Name: Rheya Wrath-of-Heaven
Rheya Wrath-of-Heaven.Keywords: Garou - Uktena - Wendigo - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Silver Pack - Female
Rheya Wrath-of-Heaven.Text: Silver Pack. Rheya works closely with the Ghost Dance camp of Wendigo. She may use cards that have Wendigo prerequisites, including Gifts, Allies, Caerns, etc.

Roshen One-Arm.Name: Roshen One-Arm
Roshen One-Arm.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Ragabash - Homid - Gaia - Male
Roshen One-Arm.Text: Roshen wields his lost Crinos arm like a club. The fetish arm-club is considered Equipment. If the arm is stolen, Roshen loses 1 Rage.
Roshen One-Arm.Errata: Clarification: Roshen's arm is Fetish Equipment with no other Keywords. (2014)

Running Creek.Name: Running Creek
Running Creek.Keywords: Garou - Uktena - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Female
Running Creek.Text: Any aggravated damage Running Creek takes can be regenerated.

Runs-to-the-Sunset.Name: Runs-to-the-Sunset
Runs-to-the-Sunset.Keywords: Garou - Children of Gaia - Ragabash - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Runs-to-the-Sunset.Text: Runs-to-the-Sunset is liason to his tribe's kinfolk. His pack may begin the game with a Wolf Kinfolk or a Wolf-Spirit in play.

Runs-without-Pack.Name: Runs-without-Pack
Runs-without-Pack.Keywords: Garou - Fianna - Ragabash - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Runs-without-Pack.Text: Runs-without-Pack cannot participate in any pack actions.

If her pack somehow acquires a male character, discard Scourge-of-Men.	Scourge's weakness applies to any male Character that joins the pack, even if it is a temporary effect. If a male ally becomes a Character, discard Scourge of Men.

Scratches-at-Fleas.Name: Scratches-at-Fleas
Scratches-at-Fleas.Keywords: Garou - Bone Gnawer - Ahroun - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Scratches-at-Fleas.Text: Part dingo, Scratches-at-Fleas is at home in the city or the Outback.

Seeks-the-Truth.Name: Seeks-the-Truth
Seeks-the-Truth.Keywords: Garou - Stargazers - Philodox - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Seeks-the-Truth.Text: When alpha, Seeks-the-Truth allows you to draw two new sept cards as his alpha action.

Sees-Past-Lies.Name: Sees-Past-Lies
Sees-Past-Lies.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Philodox - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Sees-Past-Lies.Text: Sees-Past-Lies has distinguished himself from other Red Talons by foiling the plans of a pack of duplicitous Shadow Lords. Rivalry: Shadow Lords.

Sees-through-Stars.Name: Sees-through-Stars
Sees-through-Stars.Keywords: Garou - Silent Striders - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
Sees-through-Stars.Text: Sees-through-Stars can use the Gauntlet of any caern in play to step sideways.
Sees-through-Stars.Errata: His pack does NOT need to have a caern to use this ability. He may use any caern in play.

Shakar.Name: Shakar
Shakar.Text: Shakar is of the Bagheera (panther) tribe of the Bastet (werecats).  He can use Theurge and Philodox Gifts.

Shakey Mac.Name: Shakey Mac
Shakey Mac.Keywords: Garou - Bone Gnawer - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Male
Shakey Mac.Text: Spirits play combat actions at -2 Rage when fighting Shakey Mac.

Shoragg.Name: Shoragg
Shoragg.Text: When in his horse form, Shoragg can automatically bring 1 other pack member along for a pack attack.

Silvertongue.Name: Silvertongue
Silvertongue.Keywords: Garou - Fianna - Ragabash - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Silvertongue.Text: Once per turn, Silvertongue can target a creature that called a Junta that failed. Her jeering causes the target to take one damage. Use the Junta card to mark the damage. You do not get VP if this kills the creature.

Simon Gentle.Name: Simon Gentle
Simon Gentle.Keywords: Garou - Glass Walkers - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Male
Simon Gentle.Text: Simon's suave and charming personality hides deep insecurities.

Sings-for-the-Beast.Name: Sings-for-the-Beast
Sings-for-the-Beast.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Galliard - Metis - Gaia - Female
Sings-for-the-Beast.Text: Fleeing her past in Russia, Sings-for-the-Beast is unfamiliar with Garou of the West.

Sister Judith Paws-of-Light.Name: Sister Judith Paws-of-Light
Sister Judith Paws-of-Light.Keywords: Garou - Black Fury - Theurge - Metis - Gaia - Female
Sister Judith Paws-of-Light.Text: While Sister Judith is part of your pack, you may choose one member of your pack to regenerate his highest damage card injury (instead of his lowest) during the Regeneration Phase.

Skippy.Name: Skippy
Skippy.Keywords: Iliad - Fomori - Pentex - Lupus - Beast-of-War - Wyrm - Male
Skippy.Text: At the start of the game, pick a 'handler' for Skippy. He may automatically pack attack and defend with the handler. if the handler dies, Skippy is removed from the game at the end of turn.

Snickers.Name: Snickers
Snickers.Keywords: Human - Cults - 7th Generation - Homid - Eater-of-Souls - Snatcher Caste - Wyrm - Male
Snickers.Text: Snickers can use Ragabash, Silent Striders, and Wendigo Gifts. When Alpha, Snickers can interrupt the normal alpha attack cycle to take his alpha action at any time.
Snickers.Errata: Errata: Interruption is an offensive action that happens before the declaration step of the alpha action being interrupted 6/27/2015

Sofya Softkiller.Name: Sofya Softkiller
Sofya Softkiller.Keywords: Garou - Silver Fangs - Ahroun - Homid - Gaia - Female
Sofya Softkiller.Text: Purebred and proud, Sofya is known for her arrogance.

Son of Tyr.Name: Son of Tyr
Son of Tyr.Keywords: Garou - Get of Fenris - Ahroun - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Son of Tyr.Text: Son of Tyr is a member of the Hand of Tyr camp. He will never withdraw from combat if he is the attacker, and must attack any other character who has attacked him if he is alpha.
Son of Tyr.Errata: If multiple Characters have attacked him and are Alpha, he may choose which one to attack. If none are Alpha, but can be challenged, he must challenge a Character that has attacked him. It does not have to accept. This ability does not grant him multiple"

Song Chiang.Name: Song Chiang
Song Chiang.Keywords: Garou - Glass Walkers - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Male
Song Chiang.Text: Song Chiang lives by his word.  If his player reneges on a deal-making promise, Song leaves the pack and is discarded.

Song-of-Distant-Shores.Name: Song-of-Distant-Shores
Song-of-Distant-Shores.Keywords: Garou - Wendigo - Theurge - Metis - Gaia - Male
Song-of-Distant-Shores.Text: Song may recruit any Wraith Ally, regardless of requirements.

Son-of-Moonlight.Name: Son-of-Moonlight
Son-of-Moonlight.Keywords: Garou - Fianna - Theurge - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Son-of-Moonlight.Text: After any combat in which a Wolf-Spirit was slain, Son-of-Moonlight may interrupt play and attack whoever killed the wolf.

Sound Thrashing.Name: Sound Thrashing
Sound Thrashing.Keywords: Garou - Get of Fenris - Galliard - Homid - Gaia - Female
Sound Thrashing.Text: If a Junta called by Sound Thrashing's pack fails, she gains +2 Rage for the duration of the next Combat phase.

Spotlight.Name: Spotlight
Spotlight.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Ahroun - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Spotlight.Text: Spotlight's hatred of humans has turned him into a ruthless killing machine.

Stalks Death.Name: Stalks Death
Stalks Death.Keywords: Garou - Silent Striders - Ragabash - Lupus - Gaia - Male
Stalks Death.Text: Stalks-Death has never lost a combat in his life. Anyone who defeats him may take a 'trophy,' earning them +1 victory points for killing him. He may use Philodox Gifts in addition to his normal ones.

Stands-Like-Mountain.Name: Stands-Like-Mountain
Stands-Like-Mountain.Keywords: Garou - Red Talons - Philodox - Lupus - Gaia - Female
Stands-Like-Mountain.Text: Stands-Like-Mountain tolerates humans more than her Red Talons tribemates do.

Stanislav Prochnow.Name: Stanislav Prochnow
Stanislav Prochnow.Keywords: Garou - Shadow Lords - Theurge - Homid - Gaia - Male
Stanislav Prochnow.Text: Stanislav feels the fury of the War of Rage. He must declare his alpha action against a non-Garou shapechanger if any is alpha.

Susan Anthony.Name: Susan Anthony
Susan Anthony.Keywords: Garou - Black Fury - Philodox - Homid - Gaia - Female
Susan Anthony.Text: While Susan is in your pack, you may start the game with one Kinfolk Ally in play.
Susan Anthony.Errata: Errata: Susan may start the game with any Kinfolk Ally, including those she does not meet the requirements for."

Svajda.Name: Svajda
Svajda.Text: Svajda possesses a distracting beauty. Once per game she may end any attack against her before any Combat Actions are played. This action will revert her to Homid form.

Sweet Luna's Smile.Name: Sweet Luna's Smile
Sweet Luna's Smile.Keywords: Garou - Children of Gaia - Ragabash - Metis - Gaia - Female
Sweet Luna's Smile.Text: Sweet Luna's Smile may regenerate aggravated damage. She gains +1 Rage, Gnosis and Health while a Lunar Phase is in play.

Sybil.Name: Sybil
Sybil.Keywords: Iliad - Fomori - Pentex - Homid - Beast-of-War - Wyrm - Team #21 - Female
Sybil.Text: Sybil can pack attack or defend with any other member of First Team #21 in her pack.

Firebomb.Name: Firebomb
Firebomb.Text: The bearer of the Firebomb may, as her alpha action, plant the bomb on any Territory in play. Any member of the pack who controls the Territory may defuse the bomb, but will suffer 3 damage doing so. If the Firebomb has not been defused by the end of the
Firebomb.Errata: Diffusing the Firebomb is an action.

Flak Jacket.Name: Flak Jacket
Flak Jacket.Text: Armor. The Flak Jacket stops any one attack of up to 4 damage.  The owner chooses when the Flak Jacket is used.  Discard the Flak Jacket if it is used or if the owner changes to Crinos form.  A character cannot have more than 1 Flak Jacket at a time.

Flamethrower.Name: Flamethrower
Flamethrower.Text: Weapon. A character with a Flamethrower means business. While equipped with the Flamethrower, the user may play Combat Actions of Rage 5 or lower, and they are Aggravated. If the user takes more than 4 damage in a single round of combat, the Flamethrower
Flamethrower.Errata: If you are equipped with a Flamethrower (even if you are not using it) and take 4 or more damage in a single round, it explodes. Flamethrower may be used in any form."

Urban Clash.Name: Urban Clash
Urban Clash.Text: Attacker: 14 Renown Gaia Pack. Draw 2 additional combat cards. Defender: 15 Renown Wyrm Pack. Draw 2 additional combat cards.

Village Annexation.Name: Village Annexation
Village Annexation.Text: Attacker: 15 Renown Wyrm Pack. Draw 2 additional combat cards. Defender: 10 Renown Gaia Pack. Draw 2 additional combat cards. Act at +2 Rage.

Warehouse Brawl.Name: Warehouse Brawl
Warehouse Brawl.Text: Attacker: 10 Renown Gaia Pack. Draw 1 additional combat card. No weapons may be used. Defender: 10 Renown Wyrm Pack. Draw 1 additional combat card. No weapons may be used.

War of Attrition.Name: War of Attrition
War of Attrition.Text: Attacker:  20 Renown, any pack. Draw 4 additional combat cards. Defender: 20 Renown, any pack. Draw 4 additional combat cards. If this combat does not last 5 rounds, this Battlefield remains in the Hunting Grounds and is worth no victory points.

'Eat Hot Lead, Dog Breath'\tAhadi-War_Co.Name:
'Eat Hot Lead, Dog Breath'	Ahadi-War_Council	eathotleaddogbreath15	[COM]	Combat Action		(Firearm)	Block - (Fast Striking)		7						4	When this card is revealed, if the target of 'Eat Hot Lead, Dog Breath!' played a Fast Striking Combat Action this round, this card gains Fast Striking.�
�If 'Eat Hot Lead, Dog Breath!' is played with a Firearm it blocks two points of damage from any one	
Anatomy Lesson	NewEngland-Periphery	n-anatomylesson	[COM]	Combat Action		Not Frenzied	Unblockable		6						4	Requires: not frenzied. A creature wounded by Anatomy Lesson must withdraw from combat if able. The damage from Anatomy Lesson cannot be blocked.	
Ass Whuppin' Lynch Mob	TheWyrm	rage.image.combat.event.ass.whuppin.lynch.mob	[WB-U][WC-U]	Combat Event			Pack Action									Play when your alpha declares an attack on a victim in the Hunting Grounds. Choose any or all members of your pack to join the attack. Draw 1 additional combat card for each additional pack member who joins the attack.	Creates a pack action. Creates a pack attack. 6/27/2015
Attacking the Wyrm	Unlimited	rage.image.combat.event.attacking.the.wyrm	[GC-U][GM-U][GW-C][GU-U][GO-U]	Combat Event			Pack Action									Play when your alpha declares an attack on any enemy in the Hunting Grounds. You play Attacking the Wyrm when you declare an attack; Wyrm alphas may step in after the attack has been declared so would have to face your pack. Creates a pack action.  Creates a pack attack.

Block and Roll	Ahadi-War_Council	blockandroll15	[COM]	Combat Action			Block - Fast Striking		0							Fast Striking. This creature flings himself to the ground and rolls out of the way. He may block up to 3 damage between all incoming attacks. He may not play cards of Rage 3 or higher next round.
